notes: Form 8949 AcroForm widget map for the IRS-hosted TY2025 PDF (PDF /Title metadata: '2025 Form 8949').

Form 8949 has 2 pages (Part I short-term, Part II long-term), each with 11 transaction rows and 8 columns per row: (a) description, (b) date acquired, (c) date sold, (d) proceeds, (e) cost basis, (f) adjustment code, (g) adjustment amount, (h) gain/loss.

Each page has a single 'check one' group of 6 boxes. Part I: A (1099-B basis reported), B (1099-B basis not reported), C (not on 1099-B), G (1099-DA basis reported), H (1099-DA basis not reported), I (digital asset not on 1099-DA or 1099-B). Part II uses D/E/F/J/K/L analogously.
The map stores the 6 checkboxes on each page indexed 0..5 corresponding to A..I (or D..L). Layer 1 picks exactly ONE box per page; rendered with value True.
More than 11 transactions per box require a continuation 8949 page; that's a follow-up. The Layer 2 renderer logs a warning and truncates beyond row 11.
